security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data can be manipulated during transmission without proper validation.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote data is not validated for integrity before processing.

assumptions: The governance contract does not validate the integrity of vote messages.
The actor can intercept and modify vote messages during transmission.

mitigation.strategy: Implement cryptographic integrity checks (e.g., message authentication codes) for vote data.

description: An attacker may alter vote data before it reaches the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote submission lacks mechanisms for non-repudiation.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not record verifiable evidence of the voter's identity and intent.

assumptions: The governance contract does not employ mechanisms such as digital signatures or verifiable credentials to ensure non-repudiation.
The actor is able to successfully cast votes.

mitigation.strategy: Implement digital signatures or verifiable credentials to ensure vote non-repudiation.

description: An attacker may cast votes and subsequently deny responsibility for their actions.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote transmission may be intercepted without confidentiality protections.

assumptions: The system does not employ encryption or other confidentiality measures to protect vote data during transmission.
The actor can intercept vote data during transmission.

mitigation.strategy: Encrypt vote data during transmission using TLS or other secure protocols.

description: An attacker may intercept and obtain sensitive vote information.
